subcodes.first_line: Were one to reveal all that is now hidden, a clamour would arise, for it outwardly conflicteth with the views of the people of outward forms. Yet if one were to conceal everything, none would attain eternal salvation. The manner in which the Ancient Beauty walked in Iraq and other lands is a perfect example unto all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر انسان بتمامه ظاهر نماید آنچه را که مستور است ضوضا بلند شود چه که مخالف است
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @stories; anecdotes, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions
